name: submit
title: Submit Prepared Transaction
description: Submit a previously prepared transaction. Requires the transaction hash reference, the account public key, and the Ed25519 signature over the provided hash.

hash.description: Transaction reference hash returned by the prepare tool

accountKey.description: Hex-encoded public key corresponding to the signer

value.description: Resulting CVM value converted to JSON

errorCode.description: CVM error code (if the transaction failed)
